Expected AWS Cost Breakdown by Services
The monthly cost for all AWS services used can be found at:
[Client Cost Estimate in xlsx or google sheet link]

Typically, projects of this nature incur costs. However, we are pleased to inform you that, in support of our valued partnership with <Client>, the costs associated with this project will be jointly covered by Datamellon and AWS. Therefore, there will be no cost implications to <Client> for the resources and professional services that will be utilized during/for this project. This collaborative effort by Datamellon and AWS demonstrates our commitment to supporting your AI-driven initiatives. We look forward to working closely with you and achieving significant success for your organization post-project.
Payment Terms for AWS Recurring Costs

Upon going live, <Client> will be required to settle its monthly/annual AWS cloud costs through Datamellon, leveraging the AWS Reseller Program. Please note that Datamellon will not apply any payment margins. Consequently, <Client> will remit the exact AWS costs through Datamellon, ensuring transparent and cost-effective management of AWS expenses.
Additional Benefits of the AWS Reseller Program
The AWS Reseller Program, offered through Datamellon, provides numerous benefits, including:
Expert recommendations tailored to your business needs.
Deployments are designed, built, and scaled effectively from day one, following Datamellon's design, build, and deploy strategy.
Complimentary well-architected and cost optimization reviews twice a year.
, Datamellon’s cloud billing management tool for efficient cost management.
Enjoy discounted pricing on Datamellon's implementation fees for subsequent projects.

Upon completion of this project, Datamellon will submit the associated tangible deliverable(s) to <Client> accompanied by an Acceptance Form. Upon such submission, <Client> will review, evaluate and/or test, as the case may be, the applicable deliverable(s) within five (5) business days (the “Acceptance Period”) to determine whether or not each deliverable(s) satisfies the acceptance criteria for the particular deliverable in all material respects. If the deliverable satisfies its acceptance criteria in all material respects, <Client> will furnish a written acceptance confirmation to Datamellon via the Acceptance Form prior to the end of the Acceptance Period. For a deliverable that is not accepted due to a non-conformity or defect, <Client> will indicate the detailed reason(s) for such rejection on the Acceptance Form and return the Acceptance Form together with the associated tangible rejected deliverable(s), if any, to Datamellon (a “Rejection Notice”) within the Acceptance Period.

Upon receipt of a Rejection Notice, Datamellon will promptly correct any defect(s) or non-conformities to the extent required so that each deliverable satisfies the requirements of this proposal and its acceptance criteria in all material respects. Thereafter, Datamellon will resubmit a modified deliverable to <Client>, accompanied by the Acceptance Form, and the process set forth above will be repeated. However, <Client>’s review, evaluation, and/or testing of each resubmitted deliverable will not be limited solely to verifying corrections of defects or non-conformities identified in the Rejection Notice. If <Client> discovers new errors or issues in the resubmitted deliverable that have the potential to negatively impact the project, <Client> reserves the right to notify Datamellon of such errors or issues for correction. If <Client> fails to provide Datamellon with a Rejection Notice detailing any identified errors or non-conformities prior to the end of the applicable Acceptance Period, then the corresponding deliverable(s) will be deemed accepted.
